svg.title: OpsPilot – Autonomous Incident Intelligence Platform
svg.desc: Microsoft-style enterprise architecture diagram: telemetry pipeline, autonomous detection, parallel multi-agent investigation swarm, confidence decision gateway, intelligence engine, persistence, and command center.
svg.text: AUTONOMOUS SRE COMMAND CENTER · AZURE AI FOUNDRY · MULTI-AGENT REASONING
8 independent agents · run concurrently · innovation core
Most incident platforms stop at detection.
OpsPilot autonomously investigates, explains root cause,
and recommends remediation using multi-agent reasoning —
escalating to a frontier model only when confidence is low.
Microsoft Agents League · Reasoning Agents Track · OpsPilot Architecture
